mnemonics.title: Elicitation Techniques
mnemonics.content: TECHNIQUES: Interviews, Ethnography, Collaborative Games, Hierarchy, Questionnaires, User Stories, Interface Analysis, Observation, Document Analysis, Expert Judgment, Scenarios

acronyms.usage: Formal document describing system capabilities and constraints

visualTips.visualization: Draw stick figures (actors) on left, system boundary rectangle, ovals for use cases inside

analogies.analogy: Like recipe testing - ensure ingredients (requirements) produce desired dish (system)
